TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Wu Bai Wu Bai u siwkay niza 伍佰(1968.1.14) ,tatama, nalecuh i Taywan Cyayi sian Liukuy siang. u Taywan palaway, mudadiway, misulit ku dadiway, misanga' tu dadiway. u yawkun dadiw putiputay a mudadiway atu mikitaay. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam :Gōo-pah) "伍佰 & China Blue"的主唱及主音吉他手. u sulit nu Amilika Wu Chun-lin (Chinese: 吳俊霖; pinyin: Wú Jùnlín; born 14 January 1968), better known by his stage name Wu Bai (Chinese: 伍佰; pinyin: Wǔ Bǎi; Pe̍h-ōe-jī: Gō͘-pah), is a Taiwanese rock singer and songwriter. He formed the band Wu Bai & China Blue with Dean Zavolta , Yu Ta-hao and Chu Chien-hui , while Wu himself is the lead guitarist and vocalist of the band. Dubbed "The King of Live Music", Wu is considered to be one of the biggest pop music stars in East and Southeast Asia. u kawlah niza u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.待補充)
S.PHON: wu bai wu bai u siwkaj niza **(****.*.**) ,tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħ i tajwan ʦjaji sian r~ɾiukuj siaŋ. u tajwan par~ɾawaj, mudadiwaj, misur~ɾit ku dadiwaj, misaŋaʔ~ʡ tu dadiwaj. u jawkun dadiw putiputaj a mudadiwaj atu mikitaaj. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam :g*o-paħ) "** & ʦħina br~ɾuə"*********. u sur~ɾit nu amir~ɾika wu ʦħun-r~ɾin (ʦħinəsə: ***; pinjin: w* **nr~ɾ*n; born ** *anuarj ****), bəttər known bj ħis stagə namə wu bai (ʦħinəsə: **; pinjin: w* b*i; pə*ħ-*ə-j*: g**-paħ), is a taiwanəsə roʦk siŋər and soŋwritər. ħə forməd tħə band wu bai & ʦħina br~ɾuə witħ dəan za*or~ɾta , ju ta-ħao and ʦħu ʦħiən-ħui , wħir~ɾə wu ħimsər~ɾf is tħə r~ɾəad guitarist and *oʦar~ɾist of tħə band. dubbəd "tħə kiŋ of r~ɾi*ə musiʦ", wu is ʦonsidərəd to bə onə of tħə biggəst pop musiʦ stars in əast and soutħəast asia. u kawr~ɾaħ niza u uzip niza (amiʦunus ħənaj tu sur~ɾit.***)
S.FORM: Wu Bai Wu Bai u siwkay niza 伍佰(1968.1.14) ,tatama, nalecuh i Taywan Cyayi sian Liukuy siang. u Taywan palaway, mudadiway, misulit ku dadiway, misanga' tu dadiway. u yawkun dadiw putiputay a mudadiway atu mikitaay. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam :Gōo-pah) "伍佰 & China Blue"的主唱及主音吉他手. u sulit nu Amilika Wu Chun-lin (Chinese: 吳俊霖; pinyin: Wú Jùnlín; born 14 January 1968), better known by his stage name Wu Bai (Chinese: 伍佰; pinyin: Wǔ Bǎi; Pe̍h-ōe-jī: Gō͘-pah), is a Taiwanese rock singer and songwriter. He formed the band Wu Bai & China Blue with Dean Zavolta , Yu Ta-hao and Chu Chien-hui , while Wu himself is the lead guitarist and vocalist of the band. Dubbed "The King of Live Music", Wu is considered to be one of the biggest pop music stars in East and Southeast Asia. u kawlah niza u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.待補充)
S.PHON: wu bai wu bai u siwkaj niza **(****.*.**) ,tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħ i tajwan ʦjaji sian r~ɾiukuj siaŋ. u tajwan par~ɾawaj, mudadiwaj, misur~ɾit ku dadiwaj, misaŋaʔ~ʡ tu dadiwaj. u jawkun dadiw putiputaj a mudadiwaj atu mikitaaj. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam :g*o-paħ) "** & ʦħina br~ɾuə"*********. u sur~ɾit nu amir~ɾika wu ʦħun-r~ɾin (ʦħinəsə: ***; pinjin: w* **nr~ɾ*n; born ** *anuarj ****), bəttər known bj ħis stagə namə wu bai (ʦħinəsə: **; pinjin: w* b*i; pə*ħ-*ə-j*: g**-paħ), is a taiwanəsə roʦk siŋər and soŋwritər. ħə forməd tħə band wu bai & ʦħina br~ɾuə witħ dəan za*or~ɾta , ju ta-ħao and ʦħu ʦħiən-ħui , wħir~ɾə wu ħimsər~ɾf is tħə r~ɾəad guitarist and *oʦar~ɾist of tħə band. dubbəd "tħə kiŋ of r~ɾi*ə musiʦ", wu is ʦonsidərəd to bə onə of tħə biggəst pop musiʦ stars in əast and soutħəast asia. u kawr~ɾaħ niza u uzip niza (amiʦunus ħənaj tu sur~ɾit.***)
